alma.company: ALMA For Travel and tourism Company

sections.title: BDE Manager
bullets: Manage corporate client portfolios generating SAR 500K–2.5M monthly revenue, ensuring growth and retention.
Develop business opportunities, negotiate contracts, and maintain strong relationships with clients and suppliers.
Oversee end-to-end travel operations (ticketing, hotels, visas, and packages) for corporate and individual clients.

sections.title: Data Analysis & Reporting
bullets: Advanced in Microsoft Excel (PivotTables, formulas, dashboards, Power Query).
Prepare daily sales reports and track performance to ensure targets are met.
Produce monthly, quarterly, and annual sales reports with forecasting, based on accurate data analysis.
Create target breakdown and KPI reports to monitor performance and support decision-making.
Handle large data sets, including data cleansing, validation, and reconciliation.
Deliver insights and reporting for major clients (PIF, Bupa, Nahdi, Dr. Sulaiman Al Habib groups).

sections.title: Operations, Team Coordination & Administration
bullets: Track daily sales updates and ensure alignment across teams.
Assign and monitor client requests/tickets, ensuring timely closure of open and pending cases.
Coordinate with teams and finance for billing, payments, refunds, and issue resolution.
Manage documentation, contracts, invoicing, and compliance processes.
Prepare management reports and support operational planning and process improvements.

sections.title: Legal & Diary Management
bullets: Maintain and update court hearing schedules for all active cases.
Ensure timely communication of events and reminders to the legal team.
Follow up with lawyers for weekly reports and time sheets.
Track and ensure compliance with internal deadlines for reports.

sections.title: Corporate Administration & HR
bullets: Manage and process weekly invoicing to clients with accuracy.
Collaborate with the finance team to handle invoice-related queries.
Oversee staff attendance and vacation records.
Ensure compliance with HR policies and support the HR team in staff management.
Review and approve purchase orders for office supplies and services.
Ensure proper budgeting and resource allocation.
Manage office facility maintenance and coordinate with vendors for repairs.
Ensure a professional and well-maintained working environment.

sections.title: Data, IT & Reporting
bullets: Collaborate with managing directors on firm-wide progress.
Prepare and present detailed reports on key operational metrics.
Analyze data to identify trends and provide actionable insights.
Utilize data to improve operational efficiency and decision-making.
Compile daily progress reports to keep stakeholders informed.
Monitor ongoing projects and resolve potential issues.
Manage local domain users, ensuring smooth user access and permissions.
Oversee Microsoft administration, handling user accounts and licenses.
Troubleshoot system issues, ensuring minimal downtime and disruption.
Implement cybersecurity updates, ensuring the firm’s systems remain secure and compliant with best practices.

ziraat.company: T.C Ziraat Bankasi A.S Jeddah Branch, KSA

sections.title: Trade Services Officer
bullets: Responsible for the end-to-end transactions for Input for Issuances, Amendments, Discount, Reimbursement and Commission collection of Export Documentary Letters of Credit, Collections, Standby Letters of Credit & Letter of Guarantees.
Performs second or third checks and release on Export/Import Letters of Credit/Collection presentations within delegated authorities.
Input of Standby/Guarantee demands Performs release functions of Guarantee cancellations.
Upon request by client, performs discrepancy clarification for Imports/Export & Guarantee/Standby presentations.
Performs investigations and support for escalations.
Prioritize workloads based on volumes.
Fully compliant with SAMA Operational Risk policies, Anti-Money Laundering policies, Trade Restricted Countries and Risk Approval processes.
Maintaining all transactions records in (VBA base Excel made by me).

sections.title: Sales & Customer Relationship Officer
bullets: Identify, target, and pursue sales opportunities in the Western Region.
Build, develop and maintain long-term relationships with clients.
Conduct product demonstrations and presentations to prospective clients, illustrating how our solution can meet their business needs.
Develop and close new business deals to meet revenue targets.
Negotiate pricing and contracts with customers, adhering to company policies and profitability goals.
Track and report sales activities and results using CRM tools.
Collaborate with internal stakeholders to ensure customer satisfaction and account retention.
Building and maintaining profitable relationships with key customers Corporate and Retail.
Overseeing the relationship with customers handled by my team.
Resolving customer complaints quickly and efficiently.
Keeping customers on the latest products in order to increase sales.
Meeting with managers in the organization to plan strategically.
Expanding the customer base by upselling and cross-selling.
Understanding key customer individual needs and addressing these.

sections.title: Customer Care Officer
bullets: Maintaining a positive, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times.
Responding promptly to customer inquiries.
Communicating with customers through various channels.
Acknowledging and resolving customer complaints.
Processing orders, forms, applications, and requests.
Keeping records of customer interactions, transactions, comments, and complaints.
Communicating and coordinating with colleagues as necessary.
Providing feedback on the efficiency of the customer service process.
Make sure customer satisfaction and provide professional customer support.
Guiding corporate and retail customer for account open requirements as per central bank laws.

snb.company: Saudi National Bank Head Office - Jeddah, KSA

sections.title: Senior Credit Control Officer
bullets: Creating & Maintaining all types of SNB Customers Financial Limits, Standing Instruction, Trade products, Treasury Products & all types of products for Financial Institutions Department for international Banking (including OD lines for International banks).

sections.title: Senior Trade Processer & Verifier & Trade Admin
bullets: Processing Letter of Credits, Letter of Guarantees, Collection, Settlement, Payment Vouchers, Loan agreements in Bank System (working under full pressure).
Verifying Insurance & Shipment Documents & Approving through Bank System.
Handling all internal customers A/Cs issues & Assisting Kingdom wide user by remote desktop.
Controlling Trade Department purchase requests & maintains the Budget.
Assisting IT for all Trade Servers for Printing, Data Imaging, E-Mails & Fax.

sections.title: Assisting Trade Project Manager & BDR Champion
bullets: Assisting in all Trade enhancements Projects + Reviewing BRD & Test Cases for UAT.
Preparing Policy & Procedures for All Trade Products in MS Visio & Project.
Assisting Kingdom wide staff for all new System enhancement by visiting or online.
Supervising all departments groups for BDR, Tests & Exercises.
Preparing BDR documents & all arrangements annually & monthly basis.
Communicating with all participated staff & their Families in case.

sections.title: MS Share Point Admin & Special Projects
bullets: Creating & maintaining user profiles for overall Operations Management Department to input daily data input.
Generating KPI Monthly/Annual reports & presentation in MS Power point & Power BI.
Data Auditing & Cleansing (Bank Trade System).
Develop & maintaining loan agreement generator in MS-Access/VBA.
